library.title: The Archie Library
library.summary: Voynich folios courtesy of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University (MS 408).

exhibits.title: Voynich manuscript
exhibits.description: Five folios of MS 408 — herbal, cosmological, balneological, and script quires — closely read.

exhibits.title: Techno-Futures from Bidar
exhibits.description: A condensed map of the Bidar mesh network — places, people, songs, and reflections from the field.

exhibits.title: A Field Recording from Bidar
exhibits.description: One sound from the mesh, read against its transcript — click a line to travel the audio.
